description: Recto: Legal document in the distinctive hand of Elḥanan b. Shemarya. This is a notification (moda'a) that the release that Ṣāliḥ granted a certain Nāshī is invalid because it was coerced. On the back are a few lines in Arabic script - perhaps addressed to a woman (see separate record).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
